description_long: This nightstand features a simple, boxy design with a flat square top and four straight, sturdy legs. The structure is composed of dark-colored wood with visible grain patterns, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The legs are connected by horizontal support bars near the base, adding stability and a touch of geometric style. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The finish appears matte, with subtle wear along the edges suggesting light distressing or use. Its compact size makes it suitable for placement in small urban living spaces or as a functional accent piece.
description: A minimalist, dark wood nightstand with a square top, four straight legs, and lower support bars. It has a matte finish and no visible drawers or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat square top, straight legs, and horizontal support bars with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same square top and leg structure, with the support bars more visible and no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the plain top and legs, with no drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the open leg design and support bars.
attribute_leg_design: straight wooden legs with horizontal support bars
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
